rule: Do not let mana become a normal resource like gold.
mechanic: Mana materials should be scarce, legally controlled and politically sensitive.

rule: Mana-related materials support specialists, rituals and infrastructure, not mass industry.
mechanic: No magic factories unless their ecological, labour and political costs are fully simulated.
Rulers who cannot feed cities and armies should suffer legitimacy collapse.

rule: Debt is a strategic resource pressure.
mechanic: Cities and lenders can shape wars without directly conquering territory.
